name: Stickman Synthwave Escape
short_description: Play as stickman, escape the mysterious secret laboratory and collect all the pills! Stickman Synthwave Escape has stunning colorful graphics, hand-crafted levels, tight controls, fun gameplay and synthwave soundtrack.
detailed_description:
Play as stickman, escape the mysterious secret laboratory and collect all the pills! Stickman Synthwave Escape has stunning colorful graphics, hand-crafted levels, tight controls, fun gameplay and synthwave soundtrack.

***

Stickman Synthwave Escape is a 2D action puzzle-platformer where you play as stickman and need escape the mysterious secret laboratory and collect all the pills!

Features:
• 30 levels to escape.
• Challenging platform based levels levels with traps.
• Precise and extremely simple controls.
• Beautiful pixelated graphics with carefully hand-drawn backgrounds.
• Original synthwave soundtrack

supported_languages: English, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Portuguese - Brazil, Vietnamese, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Finnish, Swedish
